steps.title: Identify the growth factor
steps.content:
Each increase of $1$ in $x$ multiplies $y$ by $4$, so the relationship is exponential with base $4$. Its form is
$$y=a(4)^x$$

steps.title: Use the initial value
steps.content:
When $x=0$, $y=150$. Since $4^0=1$, the initial value is $a=150$.
$$y=150(4)^x$$
The answer is B.
